nasb.text: Then he also made savory food, and brought it to his father; and he said to his father, “Let my father arise and eat of his son’s game, that you may bless me.”

esv.text: He also prepared delicious food and brought it to his father. And he said to his father, “Let my father arise and eat of his son’s game, that you may bless me.”

cnv.text: 他也預備了美味的食物，拿來給他父親，對他說：“請我父起來，吃你兒子的獵物，好給我祝福。”

ccb.text: 以扫把野味煮好，拿到父亲跟前，说：“父亲，请起来吃你儿子煮的野味，然后给我祝福。”

csbs.text: 以扫也做了美食，拿给他父亲，对父亲说：“我父啊，请起来，吃你儿子的野味，好为我祝福。”
